.lg9-shell { max-width: 1280px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 24px; }

.lg9-kicker { text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 2.4px; font-size: 11.5px; font-weight: 800; color: var(--lg-cyan); }
.lg9-title { font-size: clamp(2.4rem, 5.8vw, 5.4rem); line-height: 1.0; letter-spacing: -2px; font-weight: 800; margin: 0; }
.lg9-title-md { font-size: clamp(2rem, 4.2vw, 3.5rem); line-height: 1.06; letter-spacing: -1.2px; font-weight: 800; margin: 0; }
.lg9-copy { color: var(--lg-ink-soft); line-height: 1.82; font-size: 1.08rem; }
.lg9-hero-lead { font-size: clamp(1.02rem, 1.6vw, 1.15rem); line-height: 1.88; max-width: 720px; }
.lg9-divider { height: 56px; background: linear-gradient(180deg, transparent 0%, rgba(0,75,147,.08) 100%); clip-path: polygon(0 25%, 100% 0, 100% 100%, 0 100%); }
.lg9-btns { display: flex; gap: 14px; flex-wrap: wrap; align-items: center; }
.lg9-btn-primary, .lg9-btn-secondary { position:relative; overflow:hidden; display:inline-flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; gap:8px; padding:14px 22px; min-height: 50px; border-radius:12px; font-weight:800; font-size:15px; line-height:1.1; transition: transform .22s ease, box-shadow .22s ease, background .22s ease; }
.lg9-btn-primary::before, .lg9-btn-secondary::before { content:""; position:absolute; top:0; left:-120%; width:90%; height:100%; background:linear-gradient(105deg, transparent 0%, rgba(255,255,255,.22) 48%, transparent 100%); transition:left .45s ease; }
.lg9-btn-primary:hover::before, .lg9-btn-secondary:hover::before { left:130%; }
.lg9-btn-primary { background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--lg-blue), var(--lg-cyan)); color:#fff; box-shadow: 0 14px 34px rgba(0,75,147,.28); }
.lg9-btn-primary:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 18px 40px rgba(0,75,147,.36); }
.lg9-btn-secondary { border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.46); color:#fff; background: rgba(255,255,255,.12); }
.lg9-btn-secondary:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,.22); }
.lg9-card { background: var(--lg-surface); border:1px solid var(--lg-line); border-radius: 20px; box-shadow: 0 18px 44px rgba(13,27,42,.08); transition: transform .22s ease, box-shadow .22s ease; }
.lg9-card > :first-child { margin-top: 0 !important; }
.lg9-card > :last-child { margin-bottom: 0 !important; }
.lg9-card:hover { transform: translateY(-3px); box-shadow: 0 22px 50px rgba(13,27,42,.12); }
.lg9-media { overflow:hidden; border-radius: 20px; box-shadow: 0 22px 52px rgba(13,27,42,.14); }
.lg9-media img { width:100%; height:100%; object-fit:cover; transition: transform .55s ease; }
.lg9-media:hover img { transform: scale(1.04); }
.lg9-grid-2 { display:grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr)); gap: clamp(22px, 3vw, 28px); }
.lg9-grid-3 { display:grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(0, 1fr)); gap: clamp(18px, 2.2vw, 22px); }
.lg9-logo-strip { display:flex; flex-wrap:wrap; justify-content:center; gap:20px 36px; align-items:center; }
.lg9-logo-strip img { max-height:52px; width:auto; flex-shrink:0; filter: grayscale(100%) opacity(.75); }
/* Marquee / infinite ticker */
.lg9-marquee-wrap { overflow:hidden; width:100%; position:relative; }
.lg9-marquee-wrap::before, .lg9-marquee-wrap::after { content:""; position:absolute; top:0; bottom:0; width:80px; z-index:2; pointer-events:none; }
.lg9-marquee-wrap::before { left:0; background:linear-gradient(90deg,#fff 0%,transparent 100%); }
.lg9-marquee-wrap::after  { right:0; background:linear-gradient(270deg,#fff 0%,transparent 100%); }
.lg9-marquee-track { display:flex; width:max-content; animation: lg9Marquee 38s linear infinite; will-change: transform; }
.lg9-marquee-track:hover { animation-play-state: paused; }
.lg9-marquee-inner { display:flex; align-items:center; gap:52px; padding:0 26px; }
.lg9-marquee-inner img { max-height:50px; width:auto; flex-shrink:0; filter:grayscale(100%) opacity(.68); transition:filter .2s ease; }
.lg9-marquee-inner img:hover { filter:grayscale(0%) opacity(1); }
@keyframes lg9Marquee { from { transform:translateX(0); } to { transform:translateX(-50%); } }
.lg9-hero { position: relative; min-height: 84vh; display:flex; align-items:center; background:#09131f; }
.lg9-hero-bg { position:absolute; inset:0; }
.lg9-hero-bg img { width:100%; height:100%; object-fit:cover; opacity:.4; }
.lg9-hero-overlay { position:absolute; inset:0; background: linear-gradient(112deg, rgba(8,18,29,.97) 0%, rgba(10,30,50,.9) 52%, rgba(0,85,165,.62) 100%); }
.lg9-hero-inner { position:relative; z-index:2; width:100%; padding: 88px 0 76px; }
.lg9-hero-inner p { color: rgba(255,255,255,.9) !important; }
.lg9-hero-inner .lg9-stat-panel p { color: #1c2e43 !important; }
.lg9-stat-panel { background: rgba(255,255,255,.94); border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.4); border-radius: 24px; padding: 20px; backdrop-filter: blur(10px); }
.lg9-stat-big { font-size: clamp(2.6rem, 6vw, 4.8rem); line-height: 1; font-weight: 900; color: var(--lg-ink); }
.lg9-section { padding: clamp(60px, 7vw, 82px) 0; }
.lg9-section-soft { padding: clamp(60px, 7vw, 82px) 0; background: var(--lg-bg); }
.lg9-callout { position: relative; overflow: hidden; }
.lg9-callout::after { content:""; position:absolute; inset:auto -10% -40% auto; width:240px; height:240px; border-radius:999px; background:radial-gradient(circle, rgba(138,216,255,.18) 0%, rgba(138,216,255,0) 70%); pointer-events:none; }
.lg9-step { display:flex; gap: 14px; align-items:flex-start; }
.lg9-step-num { width: 42px; height: 42px; border-radius: 50%; background: linear-gradient(135deg,var(--lg-blue),var(--lg-cyan)); color:#fff; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; font-weight:800; flex-shrink:0; transition: transform .2s ease; }
.lg9-step:hover .lg9-step-num { transform: scale(1.08); }
.lg9-pill { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:6px; padding:7px 12px; border-radius:999px; background:#e8f4ff; color: var(--lg-blue); font-size:12px; font-weight:800; }
.lg9-pill::before { content: ""; width:8px; height:8px; border-radius:999px; background: linear-gradient(135deg,var(--lg-blue),var(--lg-cyan)); }
.lg9-form-note { font-size: 13px; color: #3f5873; margin-top: 12px; }
.lg9-card blockquote { border-left: 3px solid rgba(0,168,221,.4); padding-left: 16px; }
.lg9-video-grid { display:grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0,1fr)); gap: 22px; }
.lg9-video-card { background:#fff; border:1px solid var(--lg-line); border-radius:18px; overflow:hidden; box-shadow:0 16px 40px rgba(13,27,42,.08); }
.lg9-frame { aspect-ratio: 16 / 9; background:#09131f; }
.lg9-frame iframe { width:100%; height:100%; border:0; display:block; }
.lg9-video-hero { display:grid; gap: 18px; }
@media (min-width: 901px) { .lg9-video-hero { grid-template-columns: 1.4fr 1fr; align-items: start; } }

The product practically sells itself once guests interact with it.”</blockquote>

<div class="lg9"><section class="lg9-hero" style="min-height:52vh;"><div class="lg9-hero-bg"><img decoding="async" src="https://loungenie.com/Loungenie%E2%84%A2/wp-content/uploads/2026/03/3-VOR-cabana-e1773774348955.jpg" alt="Contact LounGenie" fetchpriority="high"></div><div class="lg9-hero-overlay"></div><div class="lg9-hero-inner"><div class="lg9-shell"><p class="lg9-kicker">Contact LounGenie</p><h1 class="lg9-title-md" style="color:#fff;margin:10px 0 14px;">Find out what your property can earn.</h1><p style="color:rgba(255,255,255,.88);max-width:760px;line-height:1.82;font-size:1.04rem;">The smart cabana system for waterparks, resorts, hotels, and cruise lines. We will build your free revenue projection — personally, based on your property.</p><div class="lg9-hero-trust"><span class="lg9-hero-trust-item">Zero Upfront Cost</span><span class="lg9-hero-trust-item">PoolSafe Handles Installation</span><span class="lg9-hero-trust-item">IAAPA Brass Ring Award Recipient</span></div></div></div></section><section class="lg9-section" style="background:#fff;"><div class="lg9-shell lg9-grid-2" style="align-items:start;"><div><p class="lg9-kicker">How It Works — 4 Steps</p><h2 class="lg9-title-md" style="font-size:2rem;margin:10px 0 22px;">Simple. Personal. Fast.</h2><div style="display:grid;gap:16px;"><div class="lg9-step"><div class="lg9-step-num">1</div><div><strong style="display:block;">Tell Us About Your Property</strong><p class="lg9-copy" style="margin:6px 0 0;font-size:15px;">Share what you operate — waterpark, resort, hotel, or cruise line — and how many cabanas, daybeds, or premium seating zones you have.</p></div></div><div class="lg9-step"><div class="lg9-step-num">2</div><div><strong style="display:block;">Receive Your Free Revenue Projection</strong><p class="lg9-copy" style="margin:6px 0 0;font-size:15px;">Our team personally reviews every submission and builds a projection specific to your property layout and seating capacity. Most conversations run 20 to 30 minutes.</p></div></div><div class="lg9-step"><div class="lg9-step-num">3</div><div><strong style="display:block;">Confirm Your Rollout Plan</strong><p class="lg9-copy" style="margin:6px 0 0;font-size:15px;">We walk through placement, unit options, and program structure together.</p></div></div><div class="lg9-step"><div class="lg9-step-num">4</div><div><strong style="display:block;">We Install. You Launch.</strong><p class="lg9-copy" style="margin:6px 0 0;font-size:15px;">No upfront capital. No permits. No wiring. Our team handles full on-site installation and your guests start experiencing Day 1.</p></div></div></div><div class="lg9-card" style="padding:20px;margin-top:24px;"><h3 style="margin:0 0 10px;font-size:1.1rem;">Why Contact Before Peak Season</h3><p class="lg9-copy">Peak season installation windows fill up. The properties that move first launch on time, fully branded, and ready to capture food and beverage demand from day one. Units can be customized to match your property — any color, your logo, and branded advertising panels available.</p></div><div class="lg9-card" style="padding:20px;margin-top:14px;"><h3 style="margin:0 0 10px;font-size:1.1rem;">Contact Details</h3><p class="lg9-copy">PoolSafe Inc.<br>906 Magnetic Drive, North York, ON M3J 2C4, Canada</p><p class="lg9-copy" style="margin-top:8px;"><a href="tel:+14166302444" style="color:var(--lg-blue);font-weight:700;">416-630-2444</a>  ·  <a href="mailto:info@poolsafeinc.com" style="color:var(--lg-blue);font-weight:700;">info@poolsafeinc.com</a></p></div></div><div><div class="lg9-card lg9-callout" style="padding:28px;"><p class="lg9-kicker" style="margin:0 0 8px;">Request Demo</p><h2 style="margin:0 0 14px;font-size:1.8rem;">Start the conversation.</h2><p class="lg9-copy" style="margin-bottom:20px;">Complete the form and our team will respond within one business day with a tailored revenue projection for your property.</p><div id="lg9-hubspot-form"></div><script>(function(){var s=document.createElement('script');s.charset='utf-8';s.src='//js.hsforms.net/forms/embed/v2.js';s.onload=function(){hbspt.forms.create({region:'na1',portalId:'21854204',formId:'60812333-d602-4875-bd0a-9c2b043c7d95',target:'#lg9-hubspot-form'});};document.head.appendChild(s);})();</script><p class="lg9-form-note">If the form does not load, email <a href="mailto:info@poolsafeinc.com">info@poolsafeinc.com</a>.</p></div></div></div></section></div>

title: LounGenie | Smart Poolside Revenue & Guest Experience Platform
excerpt: LounGenie helps hotels, resorts, and waterparks increase poolside revenue with QR ordering, secure storage, charging, and premium guest seating amenities.
content:
Smart Cabana System — Zero Upfront Cost

Turn Every Cabana Into A Revenue Engine — $0 Upfront

The LounGenie™ smart cabana system combines QR ordering, a waterproof safe, solar-powered USB charging, and a removable ice bucket into one commercial-grade unit. Hotels, resorts, waterparks, and cruise lines see real increases in food and drink revenue — starting Day 1, with no upfront cost.

Get Your Free Revenue Projection
Explore Features
$0 Upfront
Revenue Share Model
Built in Canada

30%+

Average increase in poolside F&B revenue at properties using LounGenie.

Zero upfront cost · Revenue share · PoolSafe installs and services.

Trusted By Hospitality Leaders

Used by top hotels, resorts, cruise lines, and waterparks worldwide.























The Core Problem

Your Pool Deck Is Losing Revenue Right Now.

Every pool deck loses revenue the same three ways. Guests leave to charge phones. They skip food orders because no server is nearby. They cut their stay short because they don’t trust leaving valuables on a lounge chair. Every hour a guest walks off the deck is a missed food and beverage opportunity. LounGenie solves all three problems at the guest’s seat.

Guests leave to charge
A dead phone sends guests off the pool deck. Without charging at the seat, they leave — and often don’t come back.
Orders get skipped
When no server is nearby and there’s no easy way to order, guests settle for less and your food and beverage revenue drops.
Valuables send guests home early
Guests who don’t trust leaving their phone and wallet on a lounge chair cut their visit short. Every early departure is lost spend.

How It Works

One unit. Four features that keep guests on your deck longer.

Order

Order at the seat — no app required.

Guests scan a QR code to order food and drinks — the order prints on a dedicated printer provided by PoolSafe. A service call button alerts staff via a touchscreen monitor showing exactly which cabana needs attention. No app download. No POS integration. No added labor.

Stash

A waterproof safe guests actually use.

Guests lock phones, wallets, and room keys inside the cabana with a waterproof keypad safe. When valuables are secure, guests stay longer and spend more. STASH is consistently the feature guests mention most in reviews.

Charge

Solar-powered charging — no wiring, no permits.

Solar panels power USB charging from sunrise to sunset at no electricity cost. When guests can charge poolside, they stop leaving the deck. And when they stay, they order.

Chill

Cold drinks at arm’s reach drive repeat orders.

A removable ice bucket keeps drinks cold at the seat for hours. Cold beverages within arm’s reach encourage high-margin repeat orders throughout the afternoon — without a server needing to check in.

Guest Journey

A day at your pool, from the guest’s point of view.

1
Lock valuables in the built-in safe
They lock their phone, wallet, and room key in the built-in waterproof safe. Guests stop worrying and start relaxing.

2
Plug in and stay charged at the seat
They plug a device into the solar-powered USB charging port. No outlet needed. No leaving the deck.

3
Scan or press to order food and drinks
They scan a QR code or press the service call button — the order prints on a dedicated printer. Staff know exactly which cabana needs attention.

4
Drinks stay cold. Guests stay longer.
Their beverages stay cold in the removable ice bucket at arm’s reach. The guest stays longer, orders more, and your servers only move when someone is ready to spend.

Installations

LounGenie installed at properties worldwide.

View full gallery →

The Business Model

We Install It. We Service It. You Keep The Revenue.

The LounGenie™ operates on a revenue-share model — zero upfront cost, zero risk. We provide the hardware, fly to your property for full installation, and handle all ongoing service. You earn more F&B and cabana rental revenue from Day 1. We share in the upside. That’s it.

Get Your Free Revenue Projection

Every Venue Type

Hotels, resorts, waterparks, cruise lines, and surf parks.

From a handful of cabanas to hundreds of premium seating areas, LounGenie scales cleanly across every outdoor hospitality environment — modular, solar-powered, and zero upfront cost.

Hotels + Resorts

Upgrade daybeds, cabanas, and reserved lounge zones. Guests spend more when valuables are secure, devices are charged, and ordering is instant.

Waterparks + Attractions

Handle high guest volume with stronger ordering flow and premium seat convenience. When guests stop leaving to charge or order, dwell time — and spend — goes up.

Cruise Lines + Specialty Venues

Weather-rated, solar-powered, and fully modular. LounGenie works in every outdoor premium seating environment, including surf parks, country clubs, and aquatic centers.

Why Guests Spend More

Two behavioral shifts drive stronger revenue.

Guests Stop Leaving The Deck.

When valuables are locked in the waterproof safe and devices are charging, guests stop leaving the pool area. Longer stays mean more ordering windows — more drinks, more food, more spend per visit.

Ordering Becomes Instant.

A QR code or service call button removes the gap between “I want a drink” and “I placed an order.” No flagging servers. No missed sales. No friction.

Partner Testimonials

What operators say about LounGenie.

“The LounGenie has enhanced our guest experience with secure storage, charging ports, and the F&B call button. Our guests love the convenience, and we’ve recommended the LounGenie to others because of the exceptional service.”

Raymond Weissert
General Manager, The Grove Waterpark and Resort

“The addition of the LounGenie to our cabanas took the experience to the next level. Our guests love the ease of use, and the units have been a big hit. We look forward to continued success with the LounGenie.”

Kamiya Woodard
Director of Guest Experience, Orlando World Center Marriott

“At Wild Rivers Waterpark in Irvine California, we pride ourselves on providing an elevated and phenomenal guest experience. Our private cabanas are equipped with great amenities, including a customized LounGenie provided by the great folks at Pool Safe. These all in one; cooler, safe, cup holders, and service call button — provide our guests with 1st class equipment so they can relax and enjoy as their families lounge in the sun.”

Mike Gioia
Director, Wild Rivers Waterpark

“We have had a great season and are pleased to say that your PoolSafe product played a big part in that success. Our guests love the convenience and value it provides to their cabana rentals. We’ve seen a positive impact on our F&B sales, and because of this success, we are planning to add new VIP seating locations for the next season.”

Bobby Covach
Cabana/Food & Beverage Director, Cowabunga Bay Waterpark

IAAPA Brass Ring Award Recipient

PoolSafe Inc. received this recognition for developing a solution that measurably enhances the guest experience while delivering operational and revenue impact for operators. One of the highest honors in the attractions and hospitality industry.

Side-by-Side Comparison

Standard cabana vs. LounGenie-equipped cabana.

Category Standard Cabana ✓ With LounGenie
Valuables Guest worries or leaves early ✓ Locked in a waterproof safe
Phone Charging Guest leaves the deck ✓ Solar-powered USB charging at the seat
Ordering Food & Drinks Flag down a server or walk to the bar ✓ Service call button alerts staff · QR scan prints order on PoolSafe printer
Cold Beverages Drinks warm up quickly ✓ Removable ice bucket keeps drinks cold for hours
Revenue per Cabana Minimal — passive furniture ✓ Incremental F&B captured throughout the day
Upfront Cost to Property N/A ✓ $0 — revenue share model
Service & Repairs Property handles repairs ✓ PoolSafe handles full installation and service

FAQ

Common questions from operators.

Is there any upfront cost?

No. LounGenie operates on a revenue-share model. Zero capital outlay, zero risk. We provide the hardware, installation, and ongoing service.

Is installation really included?

Yes. Our team flies to your property for on-site installation. No electrical wiring, no permits, no downtime required — the system is solar-powered and fully modular.

What type of properties does LounGenie serve?

Hotels, resorts, waterparks, cruise lines, surf parks, country clubs, and municipal aquatic centers. If you have premium outdoor seating, LounGenie fits.

What does each unit include?

STASH (waterproof keypad safe), CHARGE (solar USB ports), CHILL (removable ice bucket), and ORDER (QR code and/or service call button, depending on configuration).

How To Get Started

Three steps from conversation to launch.

1. We assess your property.

We review your layout, cabana count, and premium seating areas.

2. We handle full installation.

No wiring, no permits, no downtime. Our team comes to your property.

3. You earn from Day 1.

New F&B revenue starts from the first day guests interact with the units.

Get Your Free Revenue Projection
See Full Feature Set
